channel.title: Cloudformation on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Cloudformation on Arrans github.io

item.title: donnemartin/awesome-aws
item.description: A curated list of awesome Amazon Web Services (AWS) libraries, open source repos, guides, blogs, and other resources. Featuring the Fiery Meter of AWSome.

item.title: nzoschke/gofaas
item.description: A boilerplate Go and AWS Lambda app. Demonstrates an expert configuration of 10+ AWS services to support running Go functions-as-a-service (FaaS).
